bugs_found.description: Repository Fork skipped the required modal and always posted a server-owned default fork creation using the source repository name.
bugs_found.expected: Clicking Fork opens a modal with destination owner, repository name defaulting to the source name plus -fork, and a Copy main branch only toggle; POST carries those options to the backend.
bugs_found.actual: Clicking Fork immediately POSTed to /actions/fork, and the Rust API created a fork for the actor with the original source repository name.
bugs_found.reproduction: Before this fix, open /mona/octo-app, click Fork, and observe there is no dialog and the POST body contains no destinationOwner/name/mainBranchOnly options.

fix_description: Added the fork options dialog and propagated destination owner/name/mainBranchOnly through the Next action route and Rust fork API; fork names now default to -fork and destination owners are authorization-checked.
